description:
## Destination

Produce an implementation-ready specification for choosing, remembering, validating, and atomically switching Beadsmith's Current Workspace. It must make multi-workspace switching reliable without relying on the desktop process working directory.

## Notes

Planning only: resolve decisions and produce linked research/prototype assets; do not implement the feature in this map. Consult the `grilling` and `domain-modeling` skills for every HITL decision. Existing ADR 0006 and the PRD are evidence to reconcile with the specification, not implementation proof.

Standing decisions from the destination interview: use the native directory picker; a Workspace is a Beadwork-initialized Git repository root; persist a removable MRU-ordered catalog and restore the last Current Workspace; show basename plus full path without custom renaming; reject invalid directories; keep the old Current Workspace and Issue List visible until the target data loads; on switch failure retain the old workspace and show a dismissible banner; retain valid workspaces that fail loading so they can be retried.

## Decisions so far

<!-- the index — one line per closed ticket: enough to judge relevance, then zoom the link for the detail the ticket holds -->

## Not yet specified

- The precise picker state model, including how pending selection and retry are represented without exposing a stale workspace as current.
- The workspace catalog's canonical identity, duplicate and deleted-directory handling, capacity, and persistence schema.
- The concrete backend/RPC transaction and test strategy for path-threaded Beadwork commands and atomic workspace switches.

## Out of scope

- [Automatically refresh issues from Beadwork](bsm-wj1) — ongoing refresh while a Workspace remains selected is a separate effort; this map covers only initial load and switching.
- Custom Workspace renaming — the picker will use the directory basename with its full path as supporting text.
- Selecting a Beadwork subdirectory — a Workspace is the initialized Git repository root.
title: Wayfind workspace selection and switching specification
